rows.description: Allowed S. Bush Esqr. 3 yrs. Land tax for the Thrupp Annuity down to L.Day last. 1793
rows.notes: Visual verification shows these two lines form a single logical entry with the amount '3 0 0' associated with both via a bracket. Both extractors incorrectly parsed this. gemini-flash duplicated the amount across two rows; gpt-5-mini had incorrect shillings and missed the amount for the second line. My reading combines the descriptions and provides the single accurate amount.

rows.description: The late Bibb. Lect. for Attendance in Coll Lib. for one quarter June 13. 1794.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms these two physical lines form a single logical entry with the amount '3 3 0'. gemini-flash correctly parsed the description split across two rows, but listed them as separate entries (its R34 and R35). gpt-5-mini correctly combined the lines into one row but had slight errors in the description ('June 17' vs 'June 13', 'Sch' vs 'Lib'). Description is combined based on visual confirmation.
